hero_role: Data Viz Specialist | BI Consultant | Data Analyst | BI Developer
description: Building scalable, data-driven solutions that transform business decisions into results.
about_intro: I have expertise in data visualization (Power BI, Metabase), databases (SQL and tuning), Power Platform (Power Apps, Power Automate), as well as experience with dbt, BigQuery, and Google Analytics.

I also contribute to fostering a data-driven culture within teams, promoting best practices and supporting more strategic decisions through the effective use of data.
